overview_summary: Three neighboring landowners were profiled in Polk County, and none have a documented public stance for or against development. All three appear to be private residents with low public profiles and no known positions of community leadership, suggesting no high-influence opponents in the immediate area.

neighbors.name: Debbie F. Moffett Godfrey
neighbors.claims: Debbie F. Moffett Godfrey is listed as the owner of a parcel (PIN 17990) in Polk County property records [Polk County Tax Assessor’s Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). No news reports or public meeting minutes were found that mention her taking any position on local development issues as of 2026 [Polk County Standard Journal](https://www.newslibrary.com/newspapers/usa/georgia/cedartown/polk-county-standard-journal).
neighbors.influence_justification: Private landowner; no known civic role

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out personally through a polite, in-person introduction. Emphasize listening to any concerns she may have about community impacts before describing the project’s potential benefits.

neighbors.name: Susan Carol Clay
neighbors.claims: Susan Carol Clay is identified in county records as the owner of parcel #5697 in Polk County [Polk County Tax Assessor’s Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). There is no record of her voicing any opinion on development or energy projects in local media or public meetings to date [Polk County Standard Journal](https://www.newslibrary.com/newspapers/usa/georgia/cedartown/polk-county-standard-journal).

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach Ms. Clay in a neighborly manner, possibly via mutual acquaintances, to build trust. Given her lack of public stance, focus on understanding her views and reassure her about any personal concerns quietly and respectfully.

neighbors.name: John T. & Paulette H. Combs
neighbors.claims: John T. Combs and Paulette H. Combs jointly own parcel #4360 in Polk County per the county assessor’s records [Polk County Tax Assessor’s Office](https://qpublic.net/ga/polk/). They have not been mentioned in local news or documented participating in community meetings regarding development, indicating no visible stance on the project so far [Coosa Valley News](https://coosavalleynews.com/).
neighbors.influence_justification: No public profile or influence roles

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage the Combs family through a friendly, informal conversation at their convenience. With no known position on development, it’s important to respectfully introduce the project and address any questions they might have in a neighborly setting.
